proposed_direction: OE-adjacent restoration with selective usability upgrades
notes: This is the design umbrella that best matches the current evidence

proposed_direction: Keep recognisable J40 form and avoid visually loud customization
notes: Body quality matters, but the evidence does not support a wild custom direction

proposed_direction: Remove roof and correct water-channel/body issues before final finish
notes: Roof water-path issues were directly called out

proposed_direction: Expose floor repair pinholes and seal in the correct welding-primer-lining sequence
notes: This is a core structural and interior prerequisite

proposed_direction: Retain current engine pending baseline inspection
notes: Engine replacement remains exploratory rather than approved

proposed_direction: Fix wheel lag and move toward power steering if justified
notes: Power steering is repeatedly mentioned as a target outcome

proposed_direction: Refresh the current front-disc / rear-drum system first and treat rear-disc conversion as optional only if inspection or use shows a real need
notes: Current repo evidence points to front discs already fitted and rear drums retained; the highest-value path is hardware identification plus hydraulic refresh rather than defaulting to a rear-disc conversion.

proposed_direction: Use Bilstein or OME type shock upgrade rather than radical conversion
Defer full spring or 4-link conversion out of baseline scope
notes: Explicitly expensive and outside the baseline brief

proposed_direction: Perform a clean documented rewire with proper fuse and relay architecture
notes: This is one of the clearest design intentions in the evidence

proposed_direction: Start with the hot rod 21-circuit harness quote plus support items for heavy-gauge power cables grommets sleeving and test tools; treat the separate fuse block as a fallback only
notes: This keeps the electrical reset on one labeled loom strategy and avoids buying three competing harness kits at once

proposed_direction: Improve lighting reliability and headlight performance while removing accessory clutter
notes: Better headlight architecture fits the design and usage brief

proposed_direction: Use sound deadening foam and carpet after body sealing is complete
notes: Noise reduction is a direct owner requirement

proposed_direction: Review bench-seat conversion as a possible final seating layout
notes: Mentioned as a target but not yet validated against packaging

proposed_direction: Keep the dash visually clean and avoid visible aftermarket clutter
notes: Speaker-over-fuse-box style compromises run against the intended design quality

proposed_direction: Optional flush-integrated Android unit only if packaging stays clean
notes: Desired, but subordinate to dash coherence and electrical architecture

proposed_direction: Optional restrained audio upgrade with hidden or disciplined packaging
notes: Audio is allowed only if it does not dominate the build
